ref: Late in the afternoon, when the breeze began to blow, the man and woman heard the Lord God walking in the garden. So they hid behind some trees. Sin Brings a Curse

ref: Afterwards the Lord asked Cain, ‚ÄúWhere is Abel?‚Äù ‚ÄúHow should I know?‚Äù he answered. ‚ÄúAm I supposed to look after my brother?‚Äù

text: Na EWURADZE see no d…õ wonnkoku wo, osiand…õ obiara a oboku Kain no wobedzi no wer mp…õn esuon. Na EWURADZE y…õ…õ as…õnkyer…õdze bi maa Kain, amma obi hu no a, oeennku no. Kain Asefo
